description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in 5 Star Review allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) sort parameter in index2.php, (2) item_id parameter in report.php, (3) search_term parameter (aka the "search box") in search_reviews.php, (4) the profile field in usercp/profile_edit1.php, and the (5) review field in review_form.php.
